comments: Information of tracklisting from Hal C F Astell's website.
This show listing is not complete because it's missing the beginning.

Hal: "Europe live at the Hammersmith Odeon on the Out of This World tour, so presumably 1989. The set finishes at 11.20pm after 36m of my recording. There's a glitch in the recording just into Tower's Callin'."

After the Europe set, Tommy mentions a charity gig he went to 'last night' at the Dinosaur Room in the Natural History Museum in aid of the Lung Foundation. That was 27 Apr 1989, thus neatly dating this show.

track_listing.details: LP-The Dark Side Of The Moon; Harvest
LP-South Of Heaven; Def Jam Recordings
